{{Template:WIP}}

This page includes the mechanics for Endless Dream. For information on gameplay and Dream levels, see [[Endless Dream Levels]].

==Heroes==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
|-
! Name !! Class !! Basic Attack !! Active Skill !! Attack !! Target !! Attack Speed !! Energy Recovery !! How to Unlock
|-
| Darius || Warrior || || ||220 ||1 ||0.8/sec ||25/sec ||
|-
| Alibaba || Warrior || || ||239 ||1 ||0.8/sec ||16/sec ||
|-
| Sinbad || Warrior || || ||265 ||1 ||0.8/sec ||25/sec ||
|-
| Prince Atsiz || Archer || || ||214 ||3 ||1/sec ||13/sec || Awaken '''Laksh's Whistle''' to unlock Prince Atsiz' Mount
|-
| Sea Maiden || Archer || || ||234 ||4 ||1/sec ||16/sec ||
|-
| Cambyses || Archer || || ||287 ||3 ||1.2/sec ||20/sec || Awaken '''Lost Crown'''
|-
| Fisherman Judar || Priest || || ||205 ||5 ||1/sec ||11/sec ||
|-
| Lord of the Pyratism || Priest || || ||291 ||1 ||1.2/sec ||13/sec || Unlock [[Parsia INTEL|Sky City INTEL]]: Zoroastrian Sacred Fire
|-
| Aladdin || Priest || || ||263 ||5 ||0.8/sec ||13/sec ||
|}

==Dream Atar==

===Artifact Hall===
Artifacts have a 0.08% chance to be pulled from Lamp Wish. 

{|class="wikitable sortable mw-collapsible" 
|-
! Image !! Name !! Effect !! Equipped Effect
|-
! [[File:Golden_Crow.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Golden Crow || Snail HP +1000 <br> Parsia Exploration, Movement Speed +2% || Warrior DMG +20%
|-
! [[File:Copper_Horn.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Copper Horn || Troop DEF +100 <br> Parsian Exploration, Black Tadpoles +10% || Archer DMG +20%
|-
! [[File:Ebony_Horse.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Ebony Horse || Snail Water DMG +30 <br> Parsian Exploration, DMG to Enemies +5% || Priest DMG +20%
|-
! [[File:Legends_of_the_Sages.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Legends of the Sages || Snail ATK +100 <br> Dream battles: +1 Artifact slots || Each Lamp refresh, +1 Weapon
|-
! [[File:Magic_Sand_Table.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Magic Sand Table || Snail Fire DMG +30 <br> Activate Gem Crafting || Gain 10 extra energy upon defeating an enemy
|-
! [[File:Golden_Compass.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Golden Compass || Troop Water DMG +30 <br> Lamp refresh costs 25 less Magic Lamp Oil || Warrior attacks hit 2 enemies at once; skill power -10%
|-
! [[File:The_Legend_of_Snake_Bird_and_Sands.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| The Legend of Snake, Bird, and Sands || Snail Wind DMG +30 <br> Magic Lamp Level Cap +20 || Lamp healing effects +100%
|-
! [[File:Tyrants_Game.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Tyrant's Game || Troop Wind DMG +30 <br> Dream battles: +1 Artifact slots || Per weapon in battle, all heroes' DMG +5%
|-
! [[File:Dawn_of_Babylon.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Dawn of Babylon || Troop Earth DMG +30 <br> Warrior crit damage +5% || All heroes dead +50% DMG to poisoned enemies
|-
! [[File:Mirror_of_a_Thousand_Faces.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Mirror of a Thousand Faces || Troop HP +1000 <br> Parsian Exploration, Wishborn Stone +10% || Archer skill power +10% per each target reduced
|-
! [[File:Healing_Apple.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Healing Apple || Troop HP +1000 <br> Lamp refresh free attempts +1 || For every 10% energy restored by Priests, restore 3% of Magic Lamp's HP
|-
! [[File:Devils_Flask.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Devil's Flask || Troop Fire DMG +30 <br> Priest damage +5% || When landing critical hits on the same target: +10% CRIT DMG (max 5 stacks)
|-
! [[File:Feather_Robe.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Feather Robe || Snail RUSH +100 <br> Archer crit damage +5% || All heroes' attacks have 5% chance to inflict Weakness
|-
! [[File:Esoteric_Copper_Drum.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Esoteric Copper Drum || Snail HP +1000 <br> Per wave victory: +150 Magic Lamp Oil || When crafting weapons: 15% chance for +1 extra level
|-
! [[File:Flying_Demon_Boots.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Flying Demon Boots || Snail Water DMG +30 <br> Parsia Exploration, Movement Speed +2% || Gain 5 extra Magic Lamp Oil for each enemy defeated
|-
! [[File:Jamshids_Golden_Cup.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Jamshid's Golden Cup || Troop ATK +100 <br> Warrior damage +5% || Each time the hero casts an active skill, their DMG increases by 10%
|-
! [[File:Divine_Birds_Feather.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Divine Bird's Feather || Troop RUSH +100 <br> In Parsia, 2x Time Chest Drops +5% || Each attack hits 1 additional target and deals +5% DMG
|-
! [[File:Blood_of_Siavash.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Blood of Siavash || Snail Earth DMG +30 <br> In Parsia, Fire DMG +300 || All heroes' attacks deal an additional 10% Frost DMG
|-
! [[File:The_Book_of_a_Thousand_Laws.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| The Book of a Thousand Laws || <br> ||
|-
! [[File:Fang_of_Zahhak.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Fang of Zahhak || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Tear_of_the_Moon_Goddess.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Tear of the Moon Goddess || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Gold_Scale.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Gold Scale || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Shepherds_Heart.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Shepherd's Heart || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Lost_Crown.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Lost Crown || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Lakshs_Whistle.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Laksh's Whistle || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Ivory_Magic_Pipe.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Ivory Magic Pipe || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Magic_Saddlebag.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Magic Saddlebag || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Alchemy_Potion.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Alchemy Potion || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Magic_Flute.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| The Magic Flute || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Disguise_Kit.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Disguise Kit || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Shifting_Masks.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Shifting Masks || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Anahitas_Vessel.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Anahita's Vessel || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Azhdahas_Chains.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Azhdaha's Chains || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Golden_Signet_Ring.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Golden Signet Ring || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Death_of_the_King.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Death of the King || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Silver_Apple.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Silver Apple || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Golden_Fleece.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Golden Fleece || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Daric.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Daric || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Dreamwalkers_Necklace.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Dreamwalker's Necklace || <br> || 
|-
! [[File:Unclean_Ones_Bell.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Unclean One's Bell || <br> || 
|-
|}

===Weapon Hall===
Weapons can equip up to three gems each.

{|class="wikitable sortable mw-collapsible" 
|-
! Image !! Name !! Slot !! Effect
|-
! [[File:Snake_Queens_Eye.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Snake Queen's Eye || 1x1 || Lamp regenerates +3% HP every 3 seconds
|-
! [[File:Solomon_Golden_Ring.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Solomon Golden Ring || 1x1 || Defeating enemies grants +5 Magic Lamp Oil (Max Level)
|-
! [[File:Parthian_Shot.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Snake Queen's Eye || 2x1 || Poison DMG +30% (Max Level)
|-
! [[File:Frozen_Blade.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Frozen Blade || 2x1 || Frost DMG +30% (Max Level)
|-
! [[File:CultToken.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Cult Token || 3x1 || Energy recovery speed +100% (Max Level)
|-
! [[File:Sassanid_Javelin.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Sassanid Javelin || 1x3 || Attack speed +80% (Max Level)
|-
! [[File:Parsian_Scimitar.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Parsian Scimitar || || Crit DMG +120% (Max Level)
|-
! [[File:Immortal_Legion_Axe.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Immortal Legion Axe || || DMG +80% (Max Level)
|-
! [[File:Chariot_of_Cyrus.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|| Chariot of Cyrus || 2x2 || CRIT +40% (Max Level)
|-
|}

===Gem Crafting===

Gem Crafting is unlocked after activating the '''Magic Sand Table''' Artifact. Three gems of the same type and tier can be combined into one gem of the next tier.

{| class="wikitable"
|-
! !! I !! II !! III !! IV !! V
|-
| rowspan=2 | DMG || [[File:DMG_GemI]] || [[File:DMG_GemII]] || [[File:DMG_GemIII]] || [[File:DMG_GemIV]] || [[File:DMG_GemV]]
|-
| +1% || +3% || +6% || +12% || +24%
|-
| rowspan=2 | AS || [[File:AS_GemI]] || [[File:AS_GemII]] || [[File:AS_GemIII]] || [[File:AS_GemIV]] || [[File:AS_GemV]]
|-
| +1% || +3% || +6% || +12% || +24%
|-
| rowspan=2 | Energy || [[File:Energy_GemI]] || [[File:Energy_GemII]] || [[File:Energy_GemIII]] || [[File:Energy_GemIV]] || [[File:Energy_GemV]]
|-
| +1% || +3% || +6% || +12% || +24%
|-
| rowspan=2 | CRIT || [[File:Crit_GemI]] || [[File:Crit_GemII]] || [[File:Crit_GemIII]] || [[File:Crit_GemIV]] || [[File:Crit_GemV]]
|-
| +1% || +3% || +6% || +12% || +24%
|-
|}

[[Category:Parsia]]
